title: Hammerite Primer - Red Oxide. Metal Primer for Garden Furniture, Radiator and Fence Paint. Rust Inhibitor and Rust Treatment for Metal, Interior and Exterior Use - 250ml
features: PAINT DIRECTLY ON TO RUST – specially formulated so you can paint the metal primer over rusty surfaces and still achieve a perfect, smooth protective base that lasts for years and helps prevent rust and corrosion forming

EASY TO USE – preparation is simple – brush away any loose, flaky paint or rust and brush the red oxide primer straight on to the metal with minimal sanding needed. The quick drying formula is ready for topcoat after just 6 hours

USE ON ANY METAL – perfect for BBQs, radiators, railings, garden furniture and garage doors, Hammerite Red Oxide Metal Primer is suitable for use on both interior and exterior metals to give your old metals an instant lift

250ml TIN COVERS UP TO 3m2 – ideal to cover a gate or fence railing, or a set of garden chairs, Hammerite direct to rust metal primer gives excellent coverage and provides the ultimate protection for your metals

GENUINE HAMMERITE PAINT - the first and only specialist metalcare brand, Hammerite is a global brand leader. Founded in 1984 it quickly developed a mystique, as consumers found the unique formulation magically transforms rusty metal to look like new​
For use on both bare and rusty iron and steel
description: From the manufacturer Hammerite Red Oxide Primer 250ml Smooth protective base for long-lasting rust protection Suitable for use on both interior and exterior metals, Hammerite Red Oxide Primer gives excellent coverage and provides the ultimate protection for your metals. Save time on preparation Paint straight onto rusty metal surfaces with a qick-drying formula that is ready to topcoat after just 6 hours. It's so easy to restore, decorate and protect your metals and get a perfect finish every time. HOW TO USE Remove all loose rust and flaking paint with a wire brush Stir the primer and apply with a brush Leave to dry for 6 hours between applying topcoat DIRECT TO RUST Made with an innovative formula, Hammerite Red Oxide Primer gives a smooth protective base to paint on for the perfect finish. ADVANCED FORMULA Specially designed so you can paint the metal primer over rusty surfaces for a uniform finish and maximum protection against rust. QUICK-DRYING Brush straight on to the metal and the quick-drying formula is ready to topcoat after just 6 hours.
